title: Trump Misstates Facts in Charlotte Refugee Case
summary: Trump's claim about the suspect in a Charlotte stabbing case is false; the suspect was a U.S. citizen, not an immigrant.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the spread of misinformation and its potential impact on immigration debates and public perception.
